<findings>

[observation] [info] High cohesion (0.93) — files are tightly interconnected
[observation] [info] Depends on viewer foundation via symmetric imports (5 each way); enforce a public facade to prevent circular UI coupling from growing.
[observation] [info] High cohesion (0.93) suggests PRD-related components belong together, enabling focused iteration on workflow UX.
[observation] [info] Workflow panels embed business logic; add integration tests to ensure compute/import flows keep the PRD tree consistent across releases.

</findings>

<insights>

- High cohesion (0.93) — files are tightly interconnected
- Tightly leverages primitives from `web-2`; keep that dependency directional by re-exporting shared widgets instead of redefining themes here.
- Complex flows (batch import, compute, execution panels) would benefit from integration tests to ensure tree state stays consistent.
- Expose the PRD tree API (events, commands) through a facade so other zones can reuse it without importing deep component paths.
- High cohesion (0.93) suggests PRD-related components belong together, enabling focused iteration on workflow UX.
- Depends on viewer foundation via symmetric imports (5 each way); enforce a public facade to prevent circular UI coupling from growing.
- Workflow panels embed business logic; add integration tests to ensure compute/import flows keep the PRD tree consistent across releases.
- [call graph] 448 internal calls, 0 outgoing, 0 incoming (cohesion: 1, coupling: 0)

</insights>
